name: ohos-porting
description: Codex plugin for OpenHarmony and KaihongOS porting workflows, device operations, build guidance, runtime debugging, and related delivery support.

interface.shortDescription: Port, build, deploy, and debug OpenHarmony software on Linux
interface.longDescription: Use the OHOS Porting plugin to assess portability, map Linux APIs to OpenHarmony equivalents, compile with OpenHarmony command-line tools and prebuilts, deploy over HDC, debug runtime failures, and track delivery work across long-running porting efforts.
defaultPrompt: Use the OHOS Porting plugin to assess this codebase, set up the Linux build flow, and debug device deployment or runtime issues.
